---
title: Templates Overview
description: Production-ready starter applications for common cinema deployment patterns.
---

Theatrical templates are complete, deployable applications scaffolded from `theatrical init`. Each template demonstrates the full SDK and React component library in a real use case.

## Available templates

| Template | Description | Deploy |
|----------|-------------|--------|
| `react-ticketing` | Full-stack booking app — film discovery, seat selection, order confirmation | [Vercel](https://vercel.com) |

## Using a template

```bash
# Interactive setup
theatrical init

# Non-interactive
theatrical init my-cinema --template react-ticketing --api-key op_live_xxx
```

## Template structure

Each template ships with:
- Complete source code and routing
- Mock data layer for local development (no API key required to run locally)
- Environment variable configuration (`.env.example`)
- One-click deployment config (`vercel.json`)
- Setup README with customization instructions

See [React Ticketing](/templates/react-ticketing/) for a detailed walkthrough.
